<!-- Kind: references/output_contract.md | Source: SKILL.md -->

## Visualization Contract

1. **Python standard gallery**: barcode-rank and count-distribution plots.
2. **Figure-ready exports**: count summary and per-barcode tables under
   `figure_data/`.
3. **Gallery manifest**: `figures/manifest.json` records the standard counting gallery.


## Output Structure

```text
output_directory/
├── README.md
├── report.md
├── result.json
├── processed.h5ad
├── figures/
│   ├── barcode_rank.png
│   └── count_distributions.png
│   ├── count_complexity_scatter.png
│   └── manifest.json
├── tables/
│   ├── count_summary.csv
│   ├── barcode_metrics.csv
│   └── backend_summary.csv
├── figure_data/
│   ├── manifest.json
│   ├── count_summary.csv
│   └── barcode_metrics.csv
├── artifacts/
│   ├── cellranger/
│   ├── starsolo/
│   ├── simpleaf/
│   └── kb_python/
└── reproducibility/
    ├── analysis_notebook.ipynb
    ├── commands.sh
    └── requirements.txt
```
